meta.hypothesis: XVMF[i*9+k] equals raw σ_mode_k(E_i) / Σ_j σ_mode_j(E_i) at fp32 precision for every (energy, mode) in the data range. Sum-of-fractions per energy equals 1.
meta.passBar: median rel_err < 1e-5 AND p90 < 1e-4 AND max < 1e-3 (tight bars — non-subsampled, fp32 round-off floor); AND Σ_k XVMF[i*9+k] = 1 within 1e-4.
